---
title: "Matrix Completion Methods for Causal Panel Data Models"
description: "Paper Review: Slides on Athey et al., (JASA; 2021)"
date: "2025-11-30"
toc: false
categories:
  - Causal Inference
---

- These are slides for a presentation at the Applied Microeconomics Reading Group, Yonsei University, made by myself and my colleague, Wonjin Seo.

---

- [Slides](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/cyb2yoe9dk8hv39itjzna/matrix-completion-appliedRG.pdf?rlkey=lwj0gid69dvzqht6ajl9x5zy7&dl=0)
- [Published Paper](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/01621459.2021.1891924)
